faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Longwood, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination services in Longwood typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Longwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Longwood residents in most cases. Mouse infestations require immediate attention, and our team prioritizes rapid response to prevent the problem from worsening and to restore your peace of mind quickly.

faqs.question: What does your mouse extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection to identify entry points and nesting areas, strategic placement of bait stations and traps, sealing of access points, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We also provide prevention advice to keep mice from returning.

faqs.question: Are your mouse extermination methods safe for families and pets in Longwood apartments?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We take extra precautions in multi-family buildings common in Longwood, placing treatments in secure locations and providing clear safety instructions to all residents.
